description: A flaw has been found in code-projects Refugee Food Management System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /home/refugeesreport.php. This manipulation of the argument a causes sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.
